name: Cape Schanck Boardwalk
address: 420 Cape Schanck Rd, Cape Schanck VIC 3939
editorNote: The Cape Schanck boardwalk is short, obvious, and absolutely worth doing. A lot of Peninsula viewpoints require an act of faith before they pay off; this one gives you the basalt formations, the pounding water, and the lighthouse almost immediately. Think of it as the Southern Ocean aperitif before a longer walk or a late lunch inland. It is particularly good for visitors who want scale and coastline without needing to dedicate half the day to it.

heroImage.alt: The upper trail and boardwalk at Cape Schanck, looking towards the southernmost tip of the Mornington Peninsula
